assertions.reason: The /trends route rendered a real trend-analysis dashboard with summary cards, a line chart, and multiple simultaneously selected region comparisons.
evidence: /Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-advanced/trends-annotated.png shows the Trend Analysis page with summary cards, a populated chart area, and region comparison buttons.
DOM inspection found .trend-chart-svg with aria-label "Line chart showing regional event counts over time".
The page had five active comparison regions at once (United States, United Kingdom, Iran, Guatemala, Romania), confirming multi-region comparison rather than a single-series placeholder.

assertions.reason: Anomaly detection is exposed through dedicated UI: the home-page anomaly panel rendered spike metadata with severity and z-score, and the trends page separately surfaced velocity anomaly cards.
evidence: /Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-advanced/anomaly-panel-annotated.png shows the Anomaly Detection panel open from the home view.
Panel inspection returned badges ["1 spikes"] and items ["Cambodia KHElevated z=1.7"], confirming region, severity level, and z-score output.
Trend-page inspection also reported a velocity anomaly card ["KH z=1.7 elevated"], matching the dedicated anomaly panel.

assertions.reason: The GEO overlay produced a geopolitical relationship view, and opening a real France↔United States relationship displayed a shared-intel panel with country-pair context and shared stories.
evidence: /Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-advanced/geopolitical-arc-panel-annotated.png shows the home map with the GEO overlay active and the arc detail panel open.
Assisted inspection after enabling GEO confirmed overlayButtonActive=true and selected a live FR-US arc with 50 contributing storyIds.

Arc panel text resolved the pair header to "France ↔ United States" and listed shared stories including "US proposal to end war is ‘one-sided’, door to diplomacy still open, Iranian official says" and "Rubio says Iran war to last weeks, no US ground troops needed".

frictions: The trend chart and geopolitical arc surfaces are rendered in canvas/WebGL layers, so semantic element targeting is limited; validation used DOM-assisted inspection and the app’s real selection handler to verify the rendered arc panel without modifying application code.
